# terrible_community_proxmox_proxmox_node (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `node_name` (String) The targeted node to perform actions on.

### Optional

- `certificates` (String) Manages the x509 certificates of the node.
- `dns` (String) Manages the resolving DNS options of the node.
- `power_state` (String) Manages the power state of the node.
- `subscription` (String) Manages the license subscription of the node.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Indicates whether any changes were made.
